CreditAccount.description: A credit facility (credit card, line of credit, etc.) held by the organization.

current_balance.name: current_balance
current_balance.computed_from: SUM(charges + interest + fees) - SUM(payments + credits) for account_id=id

computed.formula: See domain_rules for available_credit computation logic

CreditTransaction.description: A single transaction on a credit account (charge, payment, interest, fee, etc.).

CreditStatement.description: A monthly billing statement for a credit account.

computed.formula: See domain_rules for total_charges computation logic
See domain_rules for total_payments computation logic

CreditPayment.description: A payment made toward a credit account balance.

CreditUtilizationSnapshot.description: A daily snapshot of credit utilization for trend analysis.

state.creditTransactionStore_description: Stores CSV import state and reconciliation session state

websocket_events.description: Emitted 3 days before payment due date
Emitted when statement payment is overdue
Emitted when a new statement is generated

steps: Transactions imported via CSV or entered manually
Running balance updated with balance_after snapshot per transaction
Alert emitted if utilization_pct > configured threshold
Links credit_transactions in period date range
If statement_id linked: update statement.status = paid
journal_entry_side_effects: DR Accounts Payable (credit card) / CR Bank on payment

steps: Mark is_reconciled = true for matched transactions
Flag unmatched transactions for manual review

computed_fields.formula: SUM(charges + interest + fees) - SUM(payments + credits) for all transactions on account
SUM(credit_transactions.amount WHERE direction='charge' AND statement_period=period AND credit_account_id=id)
SUM(credit_transactions.amount WHERE direction='payment' AND statement_period=period AND credit_account_id=id)

domain_rules.rule: Charges cannot exceed credit_limit unless account_type is revolving_credit with grace
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 if amount would push balance > credit_limit for non-revolving accounts
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show over-limit warning; block submission for non-revolving accounts
Disable submit and show error if payment exceeds current_balance

domain_rules.rule: Closed accounts cannot receive new transactions
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 if credit_account.closed_date is not null
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable add transaction button for closed accounts; show closed badge

domain_rules.rule: Statement period cannot overlap for same credit account
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show error if duplicate statement period attempted

domain_rules.api_guard: Emit utilization.high_alert WebSocket event; log alert
domain_rules.ui_behavior: UtilizationGauge shows red danger state; MinimumPaymentAlert displayed prominently

domain_rules.rule: Credit payment must be linked to an active bank_account
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 if bank_account is inactive or not found

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
